requirement_topic.en: Chemical Limits — Lead (Total Substrate + Paint) and Phthalates (CPSIA)
requirement_topic.zh: 化学限量——铅（基材总量+油漆）及邻苯二甲酸酯（CPSIA）
requirement_topic.zht: 化學限量——鉛（基材總量+油漆）及鄰苯二甲酸酯（CPSIA）

summary.en: The CPSIA imposes two distinct lead restrictions on children's products including toys: (1) Total lead content limit of 100 ppm in any accessible substrate component (15 U.S.C. § 1278a; previously 300 ppm, tightened to 100 ppm for products manufactured after 14 August 2011); (2) Lead in surface coatings (paint): 90 ppm limit under 16 CFR Part 1303, applicable to toys and children's products. Separately, CPSIA Section 108 and 16 CFR Part 1307 prohibit the use of certain phthalates in children's toys and child care articles at concentrations above 0.1% (1000 ppm): permanently banned phthalates are DEHP, DBP, BBP, DIBP (each ≤0.1%); additionally DINP, DPENP, DHEXP, and DCHP are prohibited in toys that can be placed in the mouth or child care articles (≤0.1%). These limits apply to the finished product and its accessible component parts.
summary.zh: CPSIA对包括玩具在内的儿童产品设有两项独立铅限量要求：（1）任何可触及基材组件的总铅含量限量为100 ppm（15 U.S.C. § 1278a；此前为300 ppm，2011年8月14日后生产的产品已收严至100 ppm）；（2）表面涂层（油漆）铅限量：依据16 CFR第1303部分，适用于玩具及儿童产品的限量为90 ppm。此外，CPSIA第108条及16 CFR第1307部分禁止在儿童玩具及儿童护理用品中使用浓度超过0.1%（1000 ppm）的特定邻苯二甲酸酯：永久禁用的邻苯二甲酸酯包括DEHP、DBP、BBP、DIBP（各≤0.1%）；另外DINP、DPENP、DHEXP及DCHP禁止用于可放入口中的玩具或儿童护理用品（各≤0.1%）。上述限量适用于成品及其可触及组件部分。
summary.zht: CPSIA對包括玩具在內的兒童產品設有兩項獨立鉛限量要求：（1）任何可觸及基材組件的總鉛含量限量為100 ppm（15 U.S.C. § 1278a；此前為300 ppm，2011年8月14日後生產的產品已收嚴至100 ppm）；（2）表面塗層（油漆）鉛限量：依據16 CFR第1303部分，適用於玩具及兒童產品的限量為90 ppm。此外，CPSIA第108條及16 CFR第1307部分禁止在兒童玩具及兒童護理用品中使用濃度超過0.1%（1000 ppm）的特定鄰苯二甲酸酯：永久禁用的鄰苯二甲酸酯包括DEHP、DBP、BBP、DIBP（各≤0.1%）；另外DINP、DPENP、DHEXP及DCHP禁止用於可放入口中的玩具或兒童護理用品（各≤0.1%）。上述限量適用於成品及其可觸及組件部分。

standards_or_laws: 15 U.S.C. § 1278a — Lead limits for children's products (100 ppm total lead in substrate; CPSIA Section 101)
16 CFR Part 1303 — Ban of lead-containing paint and certain consumer products bearing lead-containing paint (90 ppm in surface coatings)
CPSIA Section 108 / 16 CFR Part 1307 — Prohibition of children's toys and child care articles containing specified phthalates

summary.en: China's chemical limits for toys are set in GB 6675.4-2014 (Toy Safety Part 4: Chemical properties), which covers migration limits for eight heavy metals (antimony, arsenic, barium, cadmium, chromium, lead, mercury, selenium) in surface coatings and accessible plastic parts, based on migration rather than total content. The GB 6675.4 lead migration limit for surface coatings is 90 mg/kg (identical value to ASTM F963 and US 16 CFR 1303 limit). However, China's standard uses a migration test method (acid extraction), while the US CPSIA substrate lead limit of 100 ppm is a total content limit (XRF or acid digestion). China's phthalate restrictions for toys under GB 6675 align with EU REACH limits (DEHP, DBP, BBP ≤0.1%); however China does not fully replicate the additional CPSIA 16 CFR 1307 banned phthalate list (DIBP, DINP, DPENP, DHEXP, DCHP). Manufacturers should verify their products against the specific CPSIA phthalate list, not only the Chinese list.
summary.zh: 中国玩具化学限量由GB 6675.4-2014（玩具安全第4部分：化学性能）规定，涵盖表面涂层及可触及塑料件中八种重金属（锑、砷、钡、镉、铬、铅、汞、硒）的迁移限量，采用迁移量而非总含量方法。GB 6675.4表面涂层铅迁移限量为90 mg/kg（与ASTM F963及美国16 CFR 1303限量数值相同），但中国标准采用迁移测试方法（酸提取），而美国CPSIA基材铅限量100 ppm为总含量限量（XRF或酸消解法）。中国玩具邻苯二甲酸酯限量（GB 6675）与欧盟REACH限量一致（DEHP、DBP、BBP各≤0.1%），但未完全复制CPSIA 16 CFR 1307的额外禁用邻苯二甲酸酯清单（DIBP、DINP、DPENP、DHEXP、DCHP）。制造商应对照具体CPSIA邻苯二甲酸酯清单进行核查，而非仅依据中国清单。
summary.zht: 中國玩具化學限量由GB 6675.4-2014（玩具安全第4部分：化學性能）規定，涵蓋表面塗層及可觸及塑料件中八種重金屬（銻、砷、鋇、鎘、鉻、鉛、汞、硒）的遷移限量，採用遷移量而非總含量方法。GB 6675.4表面塗層鉛遷移限量為90 mg/kg（與ASTM F963及美國16 CFR 1303限量數值相同），但中國標準採用遷移測試方法（酸提取），而美國CPSIA基材鉛限量100 ppm為總含量限量（XRF或酸消解法）。中國玩具鄰苯二甲酸酯限量（GB 6675）與歐盟REACH限量一致（DEHP、DBP、BBP各≤0.1%），但未完全複製CPSIA 16 CFR 1307的額外禁用鄰苯二甲酸酯清單（DIBP、DINP、DPENP、DHEXP、DCHP）。製造商應對照具體CPSIA鄰苯二甲酸酯清單進行核查，而非僅依據中國清單。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.4-2014 — Toy Safety Part 4: Chemical properties (heavy metal migration limits in surface coatings and accessible plastic materials)
GB/T 28163-2011 — Limits and test methods for phthalate esters in toys (aligned with EU REACH; does not fully match CPSIA 16 CFR 1307 list)

gap.en: Three distinct gaps exist: (1) Lead substrate: CPSIA imposes a total content limit of 100 ppm on all accessible substrate components — Chinese GB 6675.4 only covers surface coating migration; Chinese CCC test reports do not cover total substrate lead content. Separate XRF or acid-digestion testing is needed. (2) Lead paint: Both require 90 ppm but test methodologies differ — US uses total extractable lead per 16 CFR 1303, China uses migration per GB 6675.4. (3) Phthalates: CPSIA permanently bans DEHP, DBP, BBP, and DIBP (≤0.1%) in all toys and additionally bans DINP, DPENP, DHEXP, and DCHP in toys placed in the mouth. Chinese standard does not cover DIBP, DPENP, DHEXP, or DCHP. Manufacturers producing toys with soft PVC or other plasticised materials must test against the full 16 CFR 1307 list regardless of Chinese compliance.
gap.zh: 存在三项独立差距：（1）基材铅：CPSIA对所有可触及基材组件设有100 ppm总含量限量——中国GB 6675.4仅覆盖表面涂层迁移量；中国CCC检测报告不涵盖基材总铅含量，需额外进行XRF或酸消解检测。（2）铅涂层：两国均要求90 ppm但测试方法不同——美国依据16 CFR 1303采用总可提取铅，中国依据GB 6675.4采用迁移量。（3）邻苯二甲酸酯：CPSIA永久禁止DEHP、DBP、BBP及DIBP（各≤0.1%）用于所有玩具，另外禁止DINP、DPENP、DHEXP及DCHP用于可放入口中的玩具。中国标准不覆盖DIBP、DPENP、DHEXP或DCHP。生产含软PVC或其他增塑材料玩具的制造商，无论中国合规情况如何，均须对照完整的16 CFR 1307清单进行检测。
gap.zht: 存在三項獨立差距：（1）基材鉛：CPSIA對所有可觸及基材組件設有100 ppm總含量限量——中國GB 6675.4僅覆蓋表面塗層遷移量；中國CCC檢測報告不涵蓋基材總鉛含量，需額外進行XRF或酸消解檢測。（2）鉛塗層：兩國均要求90 ppm但測試方法不同——美國依據16 CFR 1303採用總可提取鉛，中國依據GB 6675.4採用遷移量。（3）鄰苯二甲酸酯：CPSIA永久禁止DEHP、DBP、BBP及DIBP（各≤0.1%）用於所有玩具，另外禁止DINP、DPENP、DHEXP及DCHP用於可放入口中的玩具。中國標準不覆蓋DIBP、DPENP、DHEXP或DCHP。生產含軟PVC或其他增塑材料玩具的製造商，無論中國合規情況如何，均須對照完整的16 CFR 1307清單進行檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CPSIA Section 101 (15 U.S.C. § 1278a) for substrate lead; 16 CFR Part 1303 for lead-in-paint; CPSIA Section 108 / 16 CFR Part 1307 for phthalates; enforced by CPSC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 6675.4-2014 chemical limits required under CCC certification (CNCA/SAMR); phthalate limits under GB/T 28163

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese toy exports to the US face three chemical compliance gaps: total substrate lead (100 ppm — not covered by Chinese CCC), lead-in-paint test method differences (both 90 ppm but different methodologies), and an expanded phthalate ban list under 16 CFR 1307 that includes DIBP and others not covered by Chinese standards. Third-party testing by a CPSC-accepted lab against all three requirements is mandatory as part of the CPC process.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国玩具出口美国面临三项化学合规差距：基材总铅含量（100 ppm——中国CCC未覆盖）、铅涂层测试方法差异（两国均为90 ppm但方法不同）以及16 CFR 1307扩大的邻苯二甲酸酯禁用清单（含中国标准未覆盖的DIBP等）。作为CPC流程的一部分，须由CPSC认可实验室对上述三项要求进行强制第三方检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國玩具出口美國面臨三項化學合規差距：基材總鉛含量（100 ppm——中國CCC未覆蓋）、鉛塗層測試方法差異（兩國均為90 ppm但方法不同）以及16 CFR 1307擴大的鄰苯二甲酸酯禁用清單（含中國標準未覆蓋的DIBP等）。作為CPC流程的一部分，須由CPSC認可實驗室對上述三項要求進行強制第三方檢測。

source.publisher: U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) — Lead in Children's Products
